name: Moceri, Cheryl
resolved_employer: Teacher (school listed as "St. Lawrence" — likely St. Lawrence Catholic Parish/School, Cedar Park–Leander area)
evidence: Donor fields indicate a teacher at "St. Lawrence" in the Leander/Cedar Park area (zip 78641). Could not confirm the specific individual; other same-named people exist. Occupation-as-teacher is the only corroborating detail. Likely related to Dr Cross Moceri at the same 78641 zip.

name: Green, Ricky
resolved_employer: Attorney / owner, The Law Office of Ricky D. Green, PLLC (Austin; Texas workers' compensation insurance defense)
evidence: Austin attorney, SMU Law 1993, 28+ years in Texas workers' comp insurance defense; firm opened 2005 at 1807 W. Slaughter Ln. Member of Austin Black Lawyers' Assn and Travis County Bar; board/service roles at St. Stephen's Episcopal School, Breakthrough Central Texas, and the Austin Geriatric Center (civic/educational, not policy-advocacy).

name: Zavareh, Rahil
evidence: Occupation "Employed"/employer "Hospitality"; a Rahil Zavareh appears in Austin campaign-finance records (listed address 603 W. 8th St., Austin 78701) tied to the hospitality industry. No detailed public bio beyond business/campaign-finance listings.

name: Farrell, Lori
evidence: Out-of-state donor (Ponte Vedra Beach, FL 32082) listing occupation Homemaker. Public records reference a Mark T. and Lori Farrell household in Ponte Vedra Beach; no independent career/bio found to classify an industry.

name: Gregorcyk, Jennifer
evidence: Public records place a Jennifer Elizabeth Gregorcyk at 4205 Shoalwood Ave, Austin 78756 (matches donor zip), consistent with the "Self"/Homemaker occupation. A different Jennifer Raye Gregorcyk is a Round Rock ISD educator, but her Round Rock location does not match the 78756 donor address.

name: Myrick, Tracey
evidence: A Tracey L. Myrick is listed in public records at a 78732 Austin address (Steiner Ranch area), and a 2025 City of Austin campaign-finance report shows a Tracey Myrick contribution of $450. No occupation, employer, LinkedIn, or bio page could be confirmed for the Austin person; multiple unrelated Tracey/Tracy Myricks exist elsewhere.

name: Moceri, Dr Cross
resolved_employer: Self-employed physician (occupation 'Doctor' per filing); note a separately identifiable Cross Moceri is Co-CEO of Presidium real estate — likely a family member, not this donor
evidence: Donor's occupation is 'Doctor'/'Self' at Leander 78641, matching an older Cross Moceri (public records) at a Leander address, likely related to Cheryl Moceri at the same zip. A distinct, better-known Cross Moceri (JD, ex-Milbank Tweed lawyer) is Co-Founder/Co-CEO of Presidium and would file as real-estate, not 'Doctor'/'Self' — so this donor is most likely the physician relative, not the developer.

evidence: Shawn Dong's LinkedIn and ZoomInfo confirm he works at Presidium in real-estate acquisitions/investments (Master of Entrepreneurship, University of Michigan), matching the donor's stated occupation 'Real Estate Development' / employer 'Presidium' at Austin 78734.
